transcript.text:
Hello everyone
For today,
Today's mukbang,
I have 2 large orders of spicy stir-fried baby octopus (webfoot octopus)
And 50 abalones
There are abalone intestines here as well
Butter grilled abalone
The price came out to be 385,000 Won (~$348 USD)
This is the same restaurant I visited when I was filming the TV show "Live Show Today"
It was called Dae Mul Lim Abalone Octopus or something like that
I packaged this as a to-go order
Bon Appetit!
Let's do the abalone first
I really enjoyed this last time I had it and I couldn't stop thinking about it
It's butter-grilled abalone
The butter flavor is amazing

It's so good
Crazy!
Let's put the octopus on top of the abalone
Insanely delicious!
I really love spicy stir-fried octopus
[Viewer: I want to be Tzuyang's taste buds in my next life]
This is abalone intestines put together
Also butter grilled
This is really amazing
Oh no!
It tastes so good
Really good
The abalone tastes better than the octopus
I've had all kinds of abalone dishes before
But butter-grilled is the best way to eat it
Let's stack the squid on the abalone again

2 of them
Why does it feel like the food is disappearings so fast?
That's not good
They go really well together
Of course the restaurant removed the abalone teeth
This..
This will go really well with alcohol
The baby octopus was not frozen It was alive
It's so yummy
Let's stack them again
The head too
Can you imagine what it tastes like?
A giant abalone
Let's dip it in here
Seasoned abalone!
Wait, there's 1 more in here?

I'm so happy today
It's so delicious
Oh, I can't eat this
The owner told me the soy pickled garlic tastes good
I was going to try it but, Actually, I'll give it a try
I'll give it a shot since it was recommended
It's okay..?
It seems okay, maybe not
It tastes so good with the sauce
The sauce itself is great
It's not spicy It has a very unique flavor
It's the best
So tasty together
Octopus and abalone
There
[Viewer: I'm drooling]

Intestines
Let's dip the intestines in the sauce
This is perfection
Cooked a little bit burnt and golden
The butter flavor is.. wow
I can't express it in words
So good
I have Chojang (red chili pepper paste) here But does it go well with the abalone?
I never dip abalone in chojang sauce
I'll try it
Yes, I bought the stir-fried octopus
This will taste great with noodles The thin noodles
Let's slurp octopus noodles
Wow, this is huge
Let's eat it with the sauce
Put it on top

Dipping it here was a genius idea
You can still taste the butter even with the sauce
This one is very long
It's not cut
The abalone is huge!
Check it out It's big, right?
It tastes better when it's warm
But it's still great cold
The texture..
I love it
Octopus noodles again?
I'll focus on the abalone now
2 of them
Dip
Abalone
Let's get a small one

Ta-da
Can I have the honor to eat 3 of them in 1 bite?
It's not that I'm not eating the ones in the front on purpose
I simply can't reach it
Hey guys,
I'm going to make fried rice
But with no vegetables
But it will have the octopus
And the abalone What do you think?
The fried rice here tastes amazing too
I fell in love with it
Let's put the abalone now
Let's put these here
This is a one-of-a-kind fried rice There's none like it with this much abalone
Half abalone, half rice
Yum

Ta-da
Amazing
Scorched rice is the best
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
